image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: What if your memories are not as reliable as you think?
Context visual: Eyewitness accounts have shaped justice, but science reveals shocking limits.
Escalation visual: Studies show memories can be altered, with confidence often misleading the truth.
Evidence visual: In tests, participants recalled details differently after just a few days.
Payoff visual: This means eyewitness testimony isn’t foolproof; it can mislead investigations.
Cta visual: So next time you hear an eyewitness account, remember—what we think we saw may not always be true! Like and follow for m
